dimensions.literacy: Grammatical naturalness, idiomaticity, sentence variety, gloss-JP fit, lexical precision
dimensions.narrative: Beginning/middle/end, scene clarity, payoff vs. disconnected sentences
dimensions.engagement: Mood, voice, sensory detail, hooks; reader's want-to-continue pull
dimensions.integration: How gracefully reinforcement vocab/grammar is woven (vs. tacked-on tail)
dimensions.freshness: Originality of scene/image relative to the rest of the library

history.note: Initial library-wide scoring before any tail-weave rewrites.
Six lowest-scoring stories rewritten to integrate orphan-tail reuse weaves into their narrative scenes. Zero stories now below tier 4. Mean +0.43 across the library.

Second pass: the six newly-tied bottom stories (all at 18) rewritten in the same style. Library minimum lifts from 18 → 19, ★★★★★ count grows from 46 → 52. Two cascade-fix gotchas caught and corrected: gap-violations from accidentally re-introducing 開ける (story_52) and 今朝 (story_53) after 20+ story silences.

Third pass: the 4 newly-tied bottom stories (all at 19) rewritten. The orphan-tail / Q-A-drill / よ-particle-drill patterns are now eliminated from the library. Library minimum lifts from 19 → 20; ★★★★★ count grows from 52 → 56 (84% of the library). Also: this is the first pass after R2 (vocab abandonment) was retired — late reuse callbacks like 古い上着を着て in story_62 were now free editorial choices rather than mechanical R2 weaves.

Fourth pass: the 6 newly-tied bottom stories (all at 20) rewritten. Patterns cleared: list-repetition (story_3), 〜ておきます drill (story_14), trailing-fragment cluster (story_22, 58), anticlimactic ending (story_28, 58), poem-drill repetition (story_46). Library minimum lifts from 20 → 21; ★★★★★ count grows from 56 → 62 (93% of the library). Several R1 cascade reinforcements were caught and restored mid-pass: 上 (W00237) re-anchored in story_14 via 「机の上のお茶」; 置く (W00229) re-anchored in story_22 via 「皿の上に古い写真を置きます」; これ (W00134) restored to story_46; 着る (W00249) re-anchored in story_58 via 「私は上着を着て…」; G013_mashita_past restored to story_14 via 「手紙が来ました」. 言います (W00097) cascade prevented by reverting story_22's quote-tag.
